name: J2EE Bad Practices: Non-serializable Object Stored in Session
description: The product stores a non-serializable object as an HttpSession attribute. In J2EE environments with multiple JVMs, session replication requires all session data to be serializable. Storing non-serializable objects breaks session failover and can cause reliability failures.
detection_pattern: STORAGE node representing an HttpSession where a TRANSFORM stores an object that does not implement Serializable. Look for session setAttribute() calls where the value type lacks serialization capability.
